name: Sagar Amruth
tagline: vibemarketer and aura farmer for brands and creators
bio: I'm a digital growth architect and AI content pioneer at the forefront of India's AI content revolution. I've built and scaled some of India's fastest-growing AI-powered channels, generating over 500 million views annually.

I was among the first in the world to build a fully automated AI news channel, using 20+ AI tools to create content at unprecedented scale. I've led campaigns for tech giants like Google, OpenAI, Intel, and NVIDIA.

featuredImage.alt: Sagar Amruth with Satya Nadella, CEO of Microsoft
featuredImage.caption: With Satya Nadella, CEO of Microsoft
